evidence.scientific_clarity: Volcano plot clearly shows up/down/non-sig genes with threshold dashed lines and top-5 labels; axes and title are informative.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0 set; PDF uses Type3 (bitmap) fonts with DejaVu Sans default — text is not selectable/editable.
evidence.palette: Uses red (#d62728) for up and blue (#1f77b4) for down with grey for non-sig — colorblind-unsafe red/green avoided, but red/blue pair has moderate CB risk; directional discipline is correct.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout used, figure is 7x5.5in, scatter points sized appropriately; no obvious whitespace waste or label overlap (adjustText attempted).
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content; legend is upper-left and clear; threshold annotation text placement uses ax.get_xlim()[1] before axes are fully set which may misplace it; overall solid but minor issues.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF contains Type3 (bitmap) fonts — text is NOT selectable. No pdf.fonttype=42 in script. SVG produced but svg.fonttype not set to 'none'.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption explains axes, color coding, threshold lines, and top-5 labels; includes specific numerical counts (n=235 up, n=230 down, n=2535 non-sig); notes absence of gene names.

overall_strengths: Clear, well-structured volcano plot that faithfully implements the brief: 3 color classes, threshold lines, top-5 annotations, and matching caption with counts.
All required output files are present; caption is detailed and numerically specific, making the figure self-contained for a reader.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' means the PDF contains Type3 bitmap fonts — text is non-selectable and non-editable, a critical journal submission requirement.
Default DejaVu Sans font family is used throughout; no attempt to use a publication-quality font (e.g., Helvetica, Arial, or a serif) and no rcParams configuration for font style.
